} @else if (!vendor()) { } @else {
engineering

Company

}
@if (vendor()!.email) {
email {{ vendor()!.email }}
} @if (vendor()!.phone) {
phone {{ vendor()!.phone }}

build {{ vendor()!.specialty }}

location_on {{ vendor()!.address }}
